ns0:entry.ns0:title: Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex
Language: typescript
OmX - Oh My codeX: Your codex is not alone. Add hooks, agent teams, HUDs, and so much more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: YishenTu/claudian
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/YishenTu/claudian
Language: typescript
An Obsidian plugin that embeds Claude Code/Codex as an AI collaborator in your vault

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
Language: typescript
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: clash-verge-rev/clash-verge-rev
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/clash-verge-rev/clash-verge-rev
Language: typescript
A modern GUI client based on Tauri, designed to run in Windows, macOS and Linux for tailored proxy experience

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coleam00/Archon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coleam00/Archon
Language: typescript
The first open-source harness builder for AI coding. Make AI coding deterministic and repeatable.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
Language: typescript
OmniRoute is an AI gateway for multi-provider LLMs: an OpenAI-compatible endpoint with smart routing, load balancing, retries, and fallbacks. Add policies, rate limits, caching, and observability for reliable, cost-aware inference.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mksglu/context-mode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mksglu/context-mode
Language: typescript
Context window optimization for AI coding agents. Sandboxes tool output, 98% reduction. 14 platforms

ns0:entry.ns0:title: multica-ai/multica
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/multica-ai/multica
Language: typescript
The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: open-metadata/OpenMetadata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/open-metadata/OpenMetadata
Language: typescript
OpenMetadata is a unified metadata platform for data discovery, data observability, and data governance powered by a central metadata repository, in-depth column level lineage, and seamless team collaboration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: siddharthvaddem/openscreen
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/siddharthvaddem/openscreen
Language: typescript
Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sparkjsdev/spark
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sparkjsdev/spark
Language: typescript
✨ An advanced 3D Gaussian Splatting renderer for THREE.js

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thedotmack/claude-mem
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem
Language: typescript
A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.
